I haven't done it , but I've tried my best to stay focused on your problem , I have been very positive lately ... I am just trying to think of ways to improve , and how I am trying to overcome it without feeling stressed out .
i wish i could just stay positive like that but it's really hard. it's not even just today, honestly. everything has just been piling up lately and i feel like i'm constantly drowning in all of it.
how you. what you know.
